parameters.jsCode:
const state = $items('Initialize Runtime State')[0].json;
return [{ json: { ...state, embedding_started_ms: Date.now() } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ Object.assign({ vector: $json.query_vector, limit: $json.top_k, with_payload: true, with_vector: false }, $json.qdrant_filter ? { filter: $json.qdrant_filter } : {}) }}

parameters.query:
WITH rows AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM jsonb_to_recordset('{{ $json.retrieval_results_sql_json }}'::jsonb)
  AS x(
    qdrant_point_id text,
    rank integer,
    retrieval_score double precision,
    reranker_score double precision,
    channel_id text,
    channel_name text,
    thread_name text,
    first_message_id text,
    message_ids text[],
    start_ts timestamptz,
    end_ts timestamptz,
    dedupe_status text,
    dedupe_reason text,
    dedupe_matched_chunk_id text,
    dedupe_overlap_ratio double precision,
    dedupe_shared_message_count integer,
    rank_after_dedupe integer,
    selected_for_context boolean,
    payload jsonb
  )
), inserted AS (
  INSERT INTO rag_retrieval_results (
    transaction_id,
    qdrant_point_id,
    rank,
    retrieval_score,
    reranker_score,
    channel_id,
    channel_name,
    thread_name,
    first_message_id,
    message_ids,
    start_ts,
    end_ts,
    dedupe_status,
    dedupe_reason,
    dedupe_matched_chunk_id,
    dedupe_overlap_ratio,
    dedupe_shared_message_count,
    rank_after_dedupe,
    selected_for_context,
    payload
  )
  SELECT
    '{{ $json.transaction_id }}',
    qdrant_point_id,
    rank,
    retrieval_score,
    reranker_score,
    channel_id,
    channel_name,
    thread_name,
    first_message_id,
    message_ids,
    start_ts,
    end_ts,
    dedupe_status,
    dedupe_reason,
    dedupe_matched_chunk_id,
    dedupe_overlap_ratio,
    dedupe_shared_message_count,
    rank_after_dedupe,
    selected_for_context,
    payload
  FROM rows
  RETURNING 1
)
SELECT '{{ $json.transaction_id }}'::uuid AS transaction_id, count(*) AS inserted_count
FROM inserted;

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { contents: [{ role: 'user', parts: [{ text: $items('Prepare Gemini Request')[0].json.prompt }] }], generationConfig: { temperature: 0.1, maxOutputTokens: 5000 } } }}

meta.description: Shared RAG core for Phase 8. Called by intake/routing workflows; owns retrieval, rerank, dedupe, context assembly, optional Gemini, and RAG Phoenix checkpoints.
